cliApiToken.description: Shared secret for CLI authentication. Auto-generated if not set. ENV: MAGLEV_API_TOKEN

apiUrl.description: Hub URL for CLI connections. ENV: MAGLEV_API_URL

listenHost.description: Hub HTTP bind address. ENV: MAGLEV_LISTEN_HOST

publicUrl.description: Public URL for external access (e.g., Telegram Mini App). ENV: MAGLEV_PUBLIC_URL

telegramBotToken.description: Telegram Bot API token from @BotFather. ENV: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN

vapidKeys.description: Auto-generated Web Push VAPID keys. Do not edit manually.

machineId.description: Auto-generated unique machine identifier. Do not edit manually.

machineIdConfirmedByServer.description: Internal flag. Do not edit manually.

runnerAutoStartWhenRunningMaglev.description: Auto-start runner when running maglev command.
